settings.section-heading: Explore the 4-Step Anti-Hair Fall Routine for Thin Hair
settings.section-sub-heading: Work, play, rinse, repeat. You get addicted to the pace, caught up in the excitement. It’s all very exhilarating until the stress starts to affect your hair. Genesis is the first anti-fall action haircare to address both reasons of hair-fall: hair-fall from the roots and hair-fall from breakage.

settings.description_1:

Anti hair-fall fortifying shampoo for weakened hair, prone to falling due to breakage

settings.right_media_with_text_copy: Don't let hair fall woes hold you back. Never be afraid of falling hair with this routine recommended by Del De Leon, our Kérastase Senior Educator.

settings.right_image_with_text_section_title: How Can You Stop Your Hair from Falling Out?
settings.right_image_with_text_copy:
Hair fall and breakage are part of everyday life. Here’s everything you need to know about how to help stop hair falling out due to breakage, with a targeted hair care range designed to meet your needs.

Learn More

settings.left_image_with_text_copy:
Genesis is the first range to treat both kinds of hair-fall - at the root and from fiber breakage, for all women, in all lifestyles, with all degree of hair fall. A collection of 7 products supercharged with the most potent complex to answer to hair-fall needs: Aminexil, Edelweiss native cells, Ginger roots.

Learn More
